schedule.dialogue: The forge is lit. Time to work.
Break time. The fire keeps me warm.
Forge is cold. See you at dawn.

default: Bring me good materials, I make good blades.
Your sword has seen much battle. It's well-cared for.
The forge and I have an understanding. We both serve the town.
You fight with honor. Your weapons should reflect that.
forge: I can reinforce your weapon if you bring the materials.
The fire speaks to me. It tells me what the steel needs.
